RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0008 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Diego Garcia Date of Birth: 02/12/1996 SSN (tokenized): TKN-484605 Annual Income: $118,000 Employer: Acme Logistics Loan Amount: $57,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Toronto Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN15036AL Nissan Corolla 2016 EV CPO 39,000 VIN69831AL Honda Sportage 2025 EV CPO 40,000 Authorized Signature: Diego Garcia
